vocab.example: I often strike up a conversation with fellow commuters to make the long train journey feel shorter.
I recently bumped into a tourist at the museum and we ended up discussing the exhibits for nearly an hour.

vocab.meaning: dần dần trở nên cởi mở/thích ai đó hơn
vocab.example: It usually takes me a few minutes to warm up to strangers, but once the ice is broken, I'm quite chatty.

vocab.meaning: mở lòng, chia sẻ nhiều hơn
vocab.example: It's fascinating how some people will open up about their life stories after just a few minutes of talking at a bus stop.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng phạm vi (giao tiếp), thử làm điều gì đó mới
vocab.example: I’m trying to branch out and be more social, so I make a conscious effort to talk to people in public more often.

vocab.meaning: tâm đầu ý hợp ngay lập tức
vocab.example: I met a traveler at a cafe last week and we hit it off immediately because we both shared a passion for photography.

vocab.meaning: nói xen vào, góp chuyện (một cách tự nhiên)
vocab.example: I was sitting at a communal table when I heard someone mention my favorite book, so I couldn't help but chime in.

vocab.meaning: theo kịp (tốc độ hoặc chủ đề của cuộc trò chuyện)
vocab.example: Sometimes it's a challenge to keep up with locals when they use a lot of slang, but it's a great way to learn.

vocab.meaning: dần dần kết thúc cuộc trò chuyện/rời đi
vocab.example: After a pleasant exchange of pleasantries, we both just naturally drifted away to catch our respective flights.

vocab.meaning: trao đổi ý tưởng với ai đó để xem họ nghĩ gì
vocab.example: I love talking to strangers at tech meetups because I can bounce ideas off people who have a completely fresh perspective.
